overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi survival horror game featuring a character in a teal environmental suit navigating dark industrial corridors, interacting with machinery to open a massive vault door, and exploring a foggy exterior industrial yard. The atmosphere is tense and claustrophobic with low visibility, transitioning from dimly lit interiors to a hazy, floodlit outdoor area.

agents.ego_description: navigating cautiously through a narrow dark corridor illuminated only by a flashlight and sparse emergency lighting

entered.detail: rusted metal walls and ceiling of the industrial tunnel
metal walkway with debris scattered across the surface
conduit pipes running along the corridor wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a claustrophobic dark corridor with metal walls and flooring. Sparse lighting reveals debris and industrial pipes lining the path as the character moves steadily forward toward a distant light source.

scene_state.functional_zone: vault door control room with heavy machinery

events.description: character interacts with glowing red machinery inside a glass control panel to open the door
massive circular vault door opens revealing foggy exterior industrial area

agents.ego_description: operating the control panel machinery to unlock and open the large vault door

entered.detail: massive circular metal door with locking mechanisms
machinery with red emergency lights behind glass enclosure
yellow painted metal railing along the platform edge

segments.scene_description: The character enters a control room dominated by a massive circular vault door. They interact with red-glowing machinery to unlock the door, which slowly opens to reveal a foggy exterior. Yellow safety railings line the platform as the door mechanism activates.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy industrial yard with heavy machinery

events.description: exits vault door onto elevated walkway entering foggy open industrial area
character stumbles and briefly falls to the ground before recovering

agents.ego_description: walking through the foggy industrial yard toward a large tracked vehicle in the distance

entered.detail: open industrial area filled with thick fog and atmospheric lighting
tripod-mounted industrial floodlights illuminating the fog
massive industrial vehicle with tank treads and enclosed cabin

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the vault into a foggy industrial yard, the character walks across a metal bridge and stumbles briefly on the dirt ground. Portable floodlights pierce the thick fog as the character approaches a massive tracked vehicle, with industrial structures visible through the haze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic industrial interior into a vast, fog-shrouded outdoor yard. It begins with the character navigating a dark, narrow corridor lined with metal walls and debris, moving steadily toward a distant light source. As the path opens, the scene shifts into a control room where the character interacts with red-glowing machinery to unlock a massive circular vault door. The camera then follows the character through the opening vault and across a metal bridge, transitioning from the dim interior to a hazy exterior illuminated by piercing portable floodlights. Finally, the movement continues across the dirt ground toward a massive tracked vehicle and looming industrial structures visible through the thick fog.
